---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for Agent Mode Discord
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who is affected and how often?

## Proposed Solution

How should it work? Be as specific as you can.

## Persona

Which user persona does this serve?

- [ ] **Marcus** — power user, terminal-centric, runs multiple agents concurrently
- [ ] **Steph** — casual user, primarily Claude, wants it to "just work"
- [ ] **Other** — describe:

## Alternatives Considered

What else could solve this? Why is your proposed solution better?

## Additional Context

Screenshots, links, related issues, or anything else that would help.
